arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Crystal Palace LIVE: Premier League updates, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's side bid to maintain good form

arts.ttl: Manchester United announce signing of Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: The 20-year-old left-back becomes the second signing of the Ruben Amorim era
Manchester United have completed the signing of Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu in a deal worth £30 million.

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad members vs Crystal Palace confirmed as youngster promoted
arts.sum: Man Utd are set to play Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Sunday and the players have arrived at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer blow to backroom staff as key member leaves to work with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer at Besiktas
arts.sum: Manchester United have lost a key member of their backroom staff after they elected to move to a role with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer's Besiktas in Turkey.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel's stance on Marcus Rashford's England future amid Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's hopes of an England return are very much alive with Thomas Tuchel now at the helm as the ex-Chelsea manager remains an admirer of the forward

arts.ttl: Muñoz excited to bring ‘intense’ Palace to Old Trafford
arts.sum: Daniel Muñoz admits he is excited to play at Old Trafford for the first time in his career – and hopes to mark it with a win for Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Crystal Palace live early team news, TV details and kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United take on Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford to Aston Villa: Deal details, wages covered, purchase option included
arts.sum: Aston Villa will allegedly have the chance to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford on a permanent basis for £40m this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United 'considering shock move' for Premier League attacker as Marcus Rashford replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly consider making an attempt to sign Aston Villa attacker Leon Bailey on loan for the second half of the 2024-25 campaign.
